message:
feat(macros): support Vec<ResourceContent> return type in #[resource] macro [bd-24s9]

Add VecResourceContent, ResultVecResourceContent, and
McpResultVecResourceContent variants to ResourceReturnTypeKind,
enabling resource handlers that return binary data, multiple content
items, or error results to use the #[resource] macro instead of
manual impl ResourceHandler blocks.

4 new tests covering multi-part, fallible, error, and binary resources.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
